case_title: EVERYDAY MAGIC, INC. VS DEVAUGHN, JAMIE MS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $516.50 FILED BY EVERYDAY MAGIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEVAUGHN, JAMIE MS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVERYDAY MAGIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVAUGHN, JAMIE MS. $516.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $556.50, FOUR EQUAL PAYMENTS ON 4/20/, 5/5/97, 5/20/97 AND 6/5/97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEVAUGHN, JAMIE MS.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DEVAUGHN, JAMIE MS.
